zh.lifeSummary: Adam de Hussey Esq是Thomas Hussey的兒子，於1080年出生在法國。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adam de Hussey Esq是Thomas Hussey的儿子，于1080年出生在法国。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hussey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a nickname for someone who habitually wore a distinctive pair of boots or gaiters, from Old French hosed, hoset, housé, Middle English hosey, hus(s)y,‘booted, gaitered’ (from Latin hosatus).

English: status name or nickname from Middle English hus(e)wyf ‘mistress of a family; wife of a householder’ (a compound of Old English hūs ‘house’ + wīf ‘woman’). Though originally a woman's name, it is often found as a male surname, presumably in a derogatory sense. The vocabulary word became hussie, with the meaning ‘disreputable woman’, in the 16th century; the surname, however, is not associated with this meaning.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’. This was the name of a bardic family associated with the Maguires of Fermanagh, also Anglicized as Oswell or Oswald .

variants.name: Hosea
meanings: English: variant of   Hussey  . Similarity with the Old Testament prophet's name Hosea (see 3 below) is accidental.
English: in Scotland, where the name is more common, it is sometimes a variant of   Hosie  , itself a form of   Hussey  , or else a variant of   Hossack  .
African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the Biblical personal name Hosea. In the Old Testament, Hosea was a prophet who married a prostitute in order to illustrate Israel's unfaithfulness to God.

variants.name: Hosie
meanings: Scottish (northeast Scotland): variant of Irish   Hussey  .

variants.name: Oswell
meanings: Irish (Ulster): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’ (see Hussey ).

nameMeanings.name: Adam
meanings: Hebrew: The Scripture name, in Hebrew, Adham, signifying 'man;' literally earthy, red earth; Rudolph, however, says the name in Ethiopic means ' to be fair, beautiful.' Hence the nurse-name Addy, little Adam.

en.lifeSummary: Adam de Hussey Esq was born in 1080, in France as the son of Thomas Hussey. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Adam de Hussey Esq est né en 1080, à France, fils de Thomas Hussey. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Adam de Hussey Esq wurde 1080 in Frankreich, als Sohn von Thomas Hussey geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Adam de Hussey Esq è nato il nel 1080 nel Francia come figlio di Thomas Hussey. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Hussey Esqは1080年にフランスでThomas Husseyの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Hussey Esq(은)는 1080년 프랑스에서 Thomas Hussey의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Adam de Hussey Esq nasceu em 1080, em França filho de Thomas Hussey. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Adam de Hussey Esq родился в 1080 г. в местности Франция. Его отца звали Thomas Hussey. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Adam de Hussey Esq nació en 1080, en Francia como hijo de Thomas Hussey. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
